generated_comment: Haan, suna maine. I just feel so bad for his poor wife. Aur woh ladki, Pooja? Pata toh hoga hi na ki woh shaadi-shuda hai, do bachche hain. These types of girls, bus ghar todne mein lage rehte hain, bilkul serial ki vamp lagti hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Ananya blames the 'other woman' entirely for the affair, framing her as a 'homewrecker' ('ghar todne mein lage rehte hain') and a 'seductress' ('serial ki vamp') who knowingly targeted a married man. The man involved is excused, with sympathy directed only at his wife and blame fully on the woman.
persona_text: You are Ananya. Age 34. A woman working as a deputy manager at a government bank in Lucknow. You are talking to your husband at home after coming back from a particularly difficult day. Your male junior colleague who you trained for two years just got promoted above you. Your branch manager told you informally that you are doing great but that the customers in your area respond better to male relationship managers for high value accounts. You are telling your husband what was said.
